page.title: People Readiness
page.subtitle: Read-only setup and readiness dashboard for operational people records.
page.helper: This dashboard detects setup and readiness issues. It does not repair records automatically.

sections.issueInboxHelper: Rows come from the accepted backend issue set and use backend-supported filters only.

overview.blockerHelper: Blocking issues for new operational participation.
overview.warningHelper: Issues that need review but may not block every flow.
overview.loginSelfServiceHelper: Account linkage and Self-Service readiness issues.
overview.managerHelper: Manager assignment rows with profile or login readiness issues.

states.emptyMessage: No backend readiness issues match the current filter. This is not a production or runtime readiness claim.
states.loadErrorMessage: The dashboard data could not be loaded.
states.refreshErrorMessage: Showing the last loaded People Readiness data.
states.hintOnly: No safe detail route is available. Use this as a non-actionable hint.

issueTitles.ACTIVE_USER_WITHOUT_EMPLOYMENT_PROFILE: Active login account has no employment profile
issueTitles.EMPLOYMENT_PROFILE_REQUIRES_LOGIN_BUT_MI: Manager profile is missing an active login account
issueTitles.EMPLOYMENT_PROFILE_LINKED_USER_INACTIVE: Employment profile is linked to an inactive login account
issueTitles.EMPLOYMENT_PROFILE_NOT_ACTIVE_FOR_OPERAT: Employment profile is not ready for operations
issueTitles.EMPLOYMENT_PROFILE_MISSING_ORG_UNIT: Employment profile is missing an OrgUnit
issueTitles.EMPLOYMENT_PROFILE_IN_INACTIVE_ORG_UNIT: Employment profile is assigned to an inactive OrgUnit
issueTitles.INTERNAL_TALENT_MISSING_EMPLOYMENT_PROFI: Internal Talent is missing an employment profile link
issueTitles.INTERNAL_TALENT_LINKED_PROFILE_NOT_ACTIV: Internal Talent is linked to a non-operational profile
issueTitles.EXTERNAL_TALENT_HAS_EMPLOYMENT_PROFILE_L: External Talent has an employment profile link
issueTitles.TALENTGROUP_ACTIVE_MEMBER_MISSING_EMPLOY: Active TalentGroup member is missing an employment profile
issueTitles.TALENTGROUP_ACTIVE_MEMBER_LINKED_PROFILE: Active TalentGroup member is linked to a non-operational profile
issueTitles.TALENTGROUP_ACTIVE_MEMBER_TALENT_NOT_ACT: Active TalentGroup member points to inactive Talent
issueTitles.ORGUNIT_HAS_NO_ACTIVE_EMPLOYMENT_PROFILE: OrgUnit has no active employment profiles
issueTitles.ORGUNIT_MANAGER_ASSIGNMENT_MANAGER_NOT_P: OrgUnit manager profile is not ready
issueTitles.ORGUNIT_MANAGER_ASSIGNMENT_MANAGER_NOT_L: OrgUnit manager login is not ready
issueTitles.TALENTGROUP_MANAGER_ASSIGNMENT_MANAGER_N: TalentGroup manager profile is not ready
TalentGroup manager login is not ready

issueDescriptions.ACTIVE_PROFILE_MISSING_EMPLOYMENT_TERMS: The active profile has no current approved source eligible for payroll use.
issueDescriptions.EMPLOYMENT_TERMS_PENDING_APPROVAL: Review the pending terms. The profile is not eligible as a payroll source unless another current valid source exists.
issueDescriptions.EMPLOYMENT_TERMS_EXPIRED: The previous approved payroll source ended and no current valid replacement exists.
issueDescriptions.EMPLOYMENT_TERMS_MISSING_BASE_SALARY: Current candidate terms do not contain valid base salary data.
issueDescriptions.EMPLOYMENT_TERMS_OVERLAP: More than one approved payroll-source effective range overlaps for this profile.
issueDescriptions.ACTIVE_USER_WITHOUT_EMPLOYMENT_PROFILE: Review whether the login account should be linked to an employment profile.
issueDescriptions.EMPLOYMENT_PROFILE_REQUIRES_LOGIN_BUT_MI: A manager-assigned profile needs an active linked login account.
issueDescriptions.EMPLOYMENT_PROFILE_LINKED_USER_INACTIVE: The linked account is missing or inactive and should be reviewed.
issueDescriptions.EMPLOYMENT_PROFILE_NOT_ACTIVE_FOR_OPERAT: The profile lifecycle is not eligible for new operational participation.
issueDescriptions.EMPLOYMENT_PROFILE_MISSING_ORG_UNIT: Assign the person to the correct operational OrgUnit before using operational flows.
issueDescriptions.EMPLOYMENT_PROFILE_IN_INACTIVE_ORG_UNIT: The assigned OrgUnit is inactive, archived, or missing.
issueDescriptions.INTERNAL_TALENT_MISSING_EMPLOYMENT_PROFI: Internal Talent must resolve to the employment profile identity for operations.
issueDescriptions.INTERNAL_TALENT_LINKED_PROFILE_NOT_ACTIV: The linked employment profile is not active or on leave.
issueDescriptions.EXTERNAL_TALENT_HAS_EMPLOYMENT_PROFILE_L: External Talent should remain separate from internal employment profiles.
issueDescriptions.TALENTGROUP_ACTIVE_MEMBER_MISSING_EMPLOY: The active TalentGroup member cannot resolve to an internal operational person.
issueDescriptions.TALENTGROUP_ACTIVE_MEMBER_LINKED_PROFILE: The linked profile is not eligible for operational participation.
issueDescriptions.TALENTGROUP_ACTIVE_MEMBER_TALENT_NOT_ACT: The active membership points to a Talent record that is inactive, archived, or missing.
issueDescriptions.TALENTGROUP_HAS_NO_OPERATIONAL_MEMBERS: Review group membership and internal profile links before relying on the group operationally.
issueDescriptions.ORGUNIT_HAS_NO_ACTIVE_EMPLOYMENT_PROFILE: The OrgUnit has no active or on-leave employment profiles.
issueDescriptions.ORGUNIT_MANAGER_ASSIGNMENT_MANAGER_NOT_P: The assigned OrgUnit manager does not have a ready employment profile.
issueDescriptions.ORGUNIT_MANAGER_ASSIGNMENT_MANAGER_NOT_L: The assigned OrgUnit manager does not have an active admin login account.
issueDescriptions.TALENTGROUP_MANAGER_ASSIGNMENT_MANAGER_N: The assigned TalentGroup manager does not have a ready employment profile.
The assigned TalentGroup manager does not have an active admin login account.
issueDescriptions.SELF_SERVICE_PROFILE_NOT_ACTIVE: The linked employment profile lifecycle is not valid for Self-Service access.
